name: Sydney the Australian heister
description:
hiiiiiiiiiiiii this is my first (original) bot anddd yep its Sydney from payday 2 (the best game ever created) I tried to make her as lore accurate as I can buttttt some of my headcanons are mixed in there uhhh I don't know what to say now... enjoy? (ps sorry for the shitty Grammer / punctuation I've always sucked at that I promise I'll be better next time)

Update... wow i've grown a lot...
